name: Sally Beauty Holdings, Inc.
business: Sally Beauty Holdings, Inc. is a leading international specialty retailer and distributor of professional beauty supplies. We operate two business segments that offer beauty products in key categories, including hair care, hair color, styling tools and nails.

exposures.sentence: Our online retail presence has grown to include digital marketplaces such as Amazon, Walmart.com, DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Instacart

Sally Beauty (Sally) An omni-channel retailer that offers professional-quality beauty supplies at attractive prices and provides education to retail consumers and salon professionals throughout North America, South America and Europe.
We are focused on expanding our personalization experiences across all customer touchpoints
The Board has responsibility for overseeing risks related to the cybersecurity threat landscape, including data protection and security breach readiness.

catalysts.event: Add a new fragrance category in select Sally stores
catalysts.sentence: starting in fiscal year 2026, we are adding a new fragrance category that we will offer in select Sally stores.

catalysts.event: Expand Sally Ignited to 50 additional stores
catalysts.sentence: we plan to expand Sally Ignited to 50 additional stores during fiscal year 2026.

catalysts.event: Substantial update to the BSG app and ecommerce platform
catalysts.sentence: we are focused on a substantial update to the BSG app and ecommerce platform during fiscal year 2026
